metadata.description: A container image as a Knowledge-family fact about the estate — the digest-identified artifact a Compute.Container runs, and the anchor for its bill-of-materials. Knowledge, not a Resource: it is discovered (a scanner sweep), never provider-realized; its lifecycle is curation/discovered. ADOPT (not absorb) the OCI image-spec by reference (T5): identity join (digest) + a version-pinned pointer, the standard's schema is not restated. Referenced by Compute.Container via runs_image; contains SoftwarePackage (the SBOM).

digest.description: The image content digest (e.g. sha256:...) — the immutable correlation id (OCI image manifest digest). Dedup key: one record per digest.

tag.description: A human tag observed pointing at this digest (advisory; tags are mutable, the digest is not).

registry.description: The registry host serving the image (e.g. registry.example.com).

os.description: Target OS from the image config (OCI platform.os).

arch.description: Target architecture from the image config (OCI platform.architecture).

relationships.description: contains — the image bundles this package (SPDX CONTAINS; the software bill-of-materials). A declarative typed reference; the scan that produced it is Policy. Non-ordering, but walked by blast-radius/impact in reverse.
